settings.title: Buy or build
settings.text: Ask about a Business-In-A-Box, launch package, asset listing, review pack, or custom build pathway.

settings.title: List an asset
settings.text: Share the asset type, asking range, included assets, and preferred visibility level so the listing pathway can be assessed.

settings.title: Review process notes
settings.text: Review the marketplace terms and confidentiality process before requesting private information or submitting a listing.

settings.heading: Tell us what you want to buy, build, sell, or assess
settings.text: Use the structured enquiry form below to start a marketplace conversation. Include the opportunity, budget, timeline, and whether you are a buyer, seller, partner, or custom build lead.

settings.title: Buyer Guide
settings.description: Understand which marketplace path suits you.

settings.title: Seller Guide
settings.description: Prepare a business or asset for review.

settings.title: Confidentiality Process
settings.description: Understand staged access to sensitive information.

settings.heading: Helpful pages for this enquiry
settings.text: These pages explain the buyer, seller, confidentiality, and marketplace terms pathways before you submit the form.

settings.heading: Marketplace enquiry form
settings.intro: Complete the fields below so the enquiry can be routed to the right marketplace pathway. Required fields are marked with an asterisk.
settings.success_message: Your marketplace enquiry has been received.
